{{Infobox technique
| name = Pure Storm Baptism
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Pure Storm Baptism Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Pure Storm Baptism is a spiritual restoration process originally developed by [[Tiberian]] to reverse long-term damage sustained by the soul. This technique is rare, as only a small number of individuals possess the necessary knowledge to perform it, and those who do often lack the required resources. The procedure can be physically demanding and taxing on a practitioner's power, sometimes requiring the use of [[soulfire]] to complete. When applied, the process acts as a cleansing mechanism that can remake the material of an individual's spirit. While it provides significant restorative benefits, the subject may experience a period of recovery where their madra channels feel strained and their spirit remains tender.}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Pure Storm Baptism]] is a spiritual restoration process created by [[Tiberian Arelius]] to undo long-term soul damage.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Pure Storm Baptism]] is a procedure that can turn someone into an extraordinary [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] completed the [[Pure Storm Baptism]] before leaving.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Pure Storm Baptism]] is a restorative technique used by [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] utilized his access to the Pure Storm Baptism technique to facilitate a significant transformation for [[Ziel]]. To prepare for this process, [[Eithan]] used the [[Soulforge]] to gather necessary materials. In exchange for undergoing the ritual, [[Ziel]] made a formal oath to [[Eithan]]. Following the procedure, [[Ziel]] successfully reached a new stage of the Pure Storm Baptism. Because his soul remained stable throughout the ordeal, [[Ziel]] was able to advance his level of existence.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ziel]] has reached a new stage of the [[Pure Storm Baptism]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ziel]] made an oath to [[Eithan]] in return for the [[Pure Storm Baptism]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] has been using the [[Soulforge]] to prepare materials for the [[Pure Storm Baptism]] that [[Ziel]] enjoyed.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Pure Storm Baptism]] is a resource/technique [[Eithan]] has access to.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ziel]]'s soul was stable enough after the [[Pure Storm Baptism]] to advance its level of existence.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
